prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第29名，近年排名稳定在30名左右，属全国顶尖师范类高校；2026年声誉评价中未见华东师范大学直接负面记录；抖音热度排名第28（较热），综合热度约170万，短视频曝光中等偏上，反映报考关注度平稳；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号；教育学A+、统计学A+、体育学A+、中国语言文学A、地理学A、心理学A、数学A、软件工程A等14个学科达A-及以上，学科实力雄厚，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校统计学、软件工程、数据科学等招生专业高度契合；吉林省2026年高考总人数约110868人，较2025年（物理类80421+历史类31071=111492）微降约0.6%，竞争压力基本持平；华东师范大学位于上海，对吉林考生具有较强跨省吸引力；该校在吉林招生占比约0.5%–1%，属外省招生规模较小的985高校，招生计划微调对位次影响较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回暖趋势、2026年计划缩招8.5%加剧竞争、以及学校层次与学科优势的持续吸引力，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2528基准上小幅上移；预测最低位次约2558名，区间2194–2922名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2265 → 2730 → 3491 → 3581 → 2664, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; in 2024 it dropped to 3581, the lowest in recent years, and in 2025 it rebounded significantly to 2664, a recovery of about 917 places, indicating a clear warming of application enthusiasm; from 2021 to 2025, the Physics Category enrollment plans were 42, 46, 44, 44, and 47 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 43, a reduction of 4 students (about 8.5%) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and exert upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 29th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable around 30th in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities in China; no direct negative records of East China Normal University in the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin popularity ranking 28th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.7 million, short video exposure moderately high, reflecting stable application attention; no signs of admission gaps in historical abnormal admission records; 14 disciplines including Education A+, Statistics A+, Physical Education A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Geography A, Psychology A, Mathematics A, Software Engineering A, etc., reaching A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength, attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with the university's enrollment majors like Statistics, Software Engineering, Data Science; the total number of Jilin Province Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 110,868, slightly decreasing by about 0.6% compared to 2025 (Physics Category 80,421 + History Category 31,071 = 111,492), with basically flat competition pressure; East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Jilin candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Jilin is about 0.5%–1%, a 985 university with a relatively small out-of-province enrollment scale, making enrollment plan adjustments more sensitive to ranking impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the 8.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, and the sustained appeal of the school's level and disciplinary advantages, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly increase from the 2528 baseline; predicted minimum ranking about 2558, with a range of 2194–2922.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category fluctuated around 414→683→648→552→657, generally within the 550–700 range. In 2025, the ranking of 657 shifted back by about 105 places compared to 2024's 552, indicating a slight easing of competition. The enrollment plans for liberal arts/history category from 2021 to 2025 were 24, 27, 28, 26, and 17 respectively, with a significant reduction to 17 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 17, consistent with 2025, showing stability.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 29th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top-tier normal universities in China with profound liberal arts heritage. No direct negative records of East China Normal University were found in the 2026 reputation evaluation. Douyin popularity ranking is 28th (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.7 million. No signs of admission cutoff anomalies were recorded for this university. Strong disciplines include Education A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Psychology A, Marxist Theory A-, etc., highlighting its strength in liberal arts subjects and strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of normal/education majors was divided and wait-and-see, Chinese language/Chinese literature majors were recommended, and law majors were divided and wait-and-see. The number of history category candidates in Jilin Province was 32,343 in 2024 and 31,071 in 2025, showing a downward trend. In 2026, the total number of candidates is approximately 110,868, with an estimated 30,932 history category candidates based on the recent proportion of about 27.9%, a slight decrease from 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to liberal arts candidates in Jilin. The university's enrollment scale for liberal arts in Jilin is relatively small, and the stable plan has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the stable plan in 2026, the slight decrease in history category candidates, and the sustained appeal of the university's advantageous liberal arts disciplines, it is expected that the minimum ranking for history category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 657 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 672, with a range of 576–768.
